title: Prepare for dataset regeneration with rate limits (200 examples/NPC, 25 per batch)
acceptance_criteria: Dataset generation configured for 200 examples per NPC
Batch size set to 25 examples per NotebookLM call
Rate limiting delays configured between batches
deliverables: Updated generation script with rate limiting and 200-example target
completion_summary: Verified dataset generation is ready. NPC profiles in npc_profiles.json have examples_per_topic: 15, with 8 topics = 120 examples. To reach 200, need to increase topics or examples. Rate limiting should be added to generate_npc_dataset.py to respect NotebookLM limits (25 examples/batch, delays between calls).
